# Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif Raja > Machine Learning Researcher and Direct PhD student at National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, Taiwan. Designs intelligent neural surrogates for nonlinear and fractional-order dynamical systems. 30 publications across 24 WoS Core Collection journals (h-index 9, 200+ Google Scholar citations). Also referred to as: Junaid Ali, Junaid Raja, M.J.A.A. Raja, MJAA Raja, Muhammad Junaid Ali, Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif, Raja Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif, Ali Asif, and Ali Asif Raja. ## About - [Home / Bio](https://junaidaliop.github.io/): Brief introduction, current news feed, and selected publications. - [About Me](https://junaidaliop.github.io/cv/): Full academic profile — education, awards, research collaborators, skills, languages, and personal interests. - [Publications](https://junaidaliop.github.io/publications/): Full bibliography of 30 WoS-indexed publications with live Google Scholar metrics. - [CV (PDF)](https://junaidaliop.github.io/assets/pdf/cv.pdf): Downloadable academic CV. ## External profiles - [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9VTFIJcAAAAJ): All publications, citation metrics, h-index. - [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0008-9249-9983): Persistent researcher identifier. - [GitHub](https://github.com/junaidaliop): Open-source code and project repositories. ## Research focus - Intelligent neural surrogates for nonlinear and fractional-order dynamical systems - Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) - Fractional-calculus-inspired deep-learning optimization algorithms - Autoregressive exogenous (NARX / NN-ARX) neuroarchitectures with Bayesian regularization - Computational neuroscience — neuronal models (Hindmarsh-Rose, FitzHugh-Nagumo, Rabinovich-Fabrikant, locally active memristive) - Plankton, marine-ecosystem, and aquatic dynamics modeling - Malware propagation in cyber-physical systems (SCADA, Industrial IoT, mobile) - Chaotic attractor reconstruction (Lorenz-Lü-Chen and related) ## Selected venues Chaos, Solitons & Fractals · Water Research · IEEE Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics · Nonlinear Dynamics · Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence · Applied Soft Computing · Computers in Biology and Medicine · Biomedical Signal Processing and Control · Communications in Nonlinear Science and Numerical Simulation · International Journal of Computer Mathematics · CMES · Process Safety and Environmental Protection · Heliyon · Journal of Industrial Information Integration · International Journal of Information Security · Computational Biology and Chemistry · Environmental Monitoring and Assessment · Journal of Thermal Analysis and Calorimetry · Nano ## Affiliation - Direct PhD Student, Dept. of Computer Science and Information Engineering, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology (YunTech), Yunlin, Taiwan. - Supervisor: Prof. Chuan-Yu Chang (MIPL Lab). - Research mentor: Prof. Muhammad Asif Zahoor Raja. - Alumnus: School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science (SEECS), National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST), Islamabad, Pakistan. ## Honors - Phi Tau Phi Scholastic Honor Society member — top 2% of graduate master's students, Republic of China. - Selected for Direct PhD program (Sept 2025), YunTech.
